headline: Session 23 targets beta-facing broken affordances and public-surface completeness: newsletter export, live ticker, Commissioner lobby, action buttons, and dual-audience legal/contact metadata.

items.title: Repair the Season Newsletter action
items.why: The browser app imports many settings actions but live grep proved the Season Newsletter button calls generateFranchiseNewsletter without importing it. That makes a visible beta/share affordance throw a ReferenceError at the exact moment the player tries to export a season story.
items.recipe: Import generateFranchiseNewsletter into public/app.js, keep the existing button behavior, and add a source-level regression that the action is imported and callable.
items.evidence: public/app.js calls generateFranchiseNewsletter(state); public/lib/franchiseNewsletter.js exports it; no import existed before Session 23.

L2.recipe: Add import plus a focused browser-wiring regression.

L3.recipe: Add Playwright coverage that opens the newsletter export in a controlled browser context.

items.title: Restore the live news ticker renderer
items.why: The game markup exposes #newsTickerContent, but renderNewsTicker searched for a .news-ticker-track child that does not exist. That silently disables the beat-reporter pulse row and makes league events feel flatter than the underlying simulation supports.
items.recipe: Render ticker items into #newsTickerContent, keep the existing escape path, and add a wiring regression that prevents the stale selector from returning.

L3.recipe: Add an animated ticker track that respects reduced motion and mobile overflow.

items.title: Fix the Commissioner lobby UI/runtime contract
items.why: Commissioner Mode is presented as async multiplayer, but the app sent gmId/teamId while the local runtime required userId/controlledTeamId and the status renderer read fields the runtime never returns. The result is a visible advanced feature that fails its first create/join/ready loop in client-only mode.
items.recipe: Align app payloads with runtime names, accept legacy aliases in localApiRuntime, render leagueId/gateStatus/player status, enable controls only when a lobby exists, and cover the full create/join/ready/advance path with a runtime test.
items.evidence: public/app.js sent gmId/teamId; src/app/api/localApiRuntime.js required commissionerId/userId/controlledTeamId; public/lib/tabSettings.js read lobby.id/gateOpen/p.ready.

L2.recipe: Patch aliases, renderer fields, and focused runtime coverage.

L3.recipe: Also wire intent queue creation from the UI and render queued intent summaries.

items.title: Repair the Cap Casualty action button
items.why: The app shell calls loadContracts(), but the imported loader is loadContractsTeam(). This leaves a cap-management action wired to an undefined function and creates another avoidable beta trust break.
items.recipe: Replace the undefined loadContracts call with loadContractsTeam and add it to the browser-wiring regression.
items.evidence: rg found loadContracts() only in public/app.js and loadContractsTeam exported by public/lib/gameFlow.js.

L2.recipe: Rename the call and test that the stale call is absent.

L3.recipe: Add Playwright coverage for the Contracts cap casualty panel.

items.title: Complete the public contact/legal/agent metadata surface
items.why: The repo is public-unlaunched and the app footers link only to the author brand, while current public-site canon expects contact, privacy, terms, sitemap, agents.json, and llms.txt. This is not the Cloudflare launch blocker; it is a local static gap the repo can honestly fix before domain repair.
items.recipe: Add public contact/privacy/terms pages, agents.json, .well-known/llms.txt, sitemap.xml, footer links from primary pages, and tests that the static source files exist and carry proprietary-first language.
items.evidence: rg found no privacy/terms/contact/agents.json/llms.txt/sitemap.xml in public before Session 23.

L2.recipe: Add files, links, and static tests.

L3.recipe: Also add release footer manifest coverage and HTML canonical injection for every static page.

skipped.reason: Still blocked by missing Cloudflare/admin capability from this repo; the existing runbook remains the honest path and launch readiness must not be force-greened.
Public launch remains blocked until the external domain smoke passes and release-gate checks are green.

executionLog.evidence: App payloads aligned, local runtime accepts canonical/legacy aliases, status renderer uses leagueId/gateStatus/status, and local runtime create/join/ready/advance test passes.
public/app.js imports generateFranchiseNewsletter; browser-wiring test covers the action.
renderNewsTicker targets #newsTickerContent and stale .news-ticker-track selector is covered by test/browser-wiring.test.js.
Cap Casualty action calls loadContractsTeam and source regression confirms no stale loadContracts call remains.
contact/privacy/terms/agents/llms/sitemap files added, linked, built, and smoke-tested.
build-pages canonicalizes all static HTML pages and smoke-pages asserts public route artifacts in static bundle.
Post-push smoke found project-path compliance routes falling into fallback; build-pages mirrors the artifact under static/vaultspark-football-gm and smoke-pages asserts mirrored files.
